arts.ttl: Mexico vs USMNT latest injury update: who will play in the friendly match?
arts.sum: Several key players, especially from the United States, will be unavailable for the match at Akron Stadium in Zapopan, Guadalajara, next Tuesday. Mauricio Pochettino made a last-minute decision to send several key players back to their clubs.

arts.ttl: Can Pochettino, Aguirre breathe new life into USMNT-Mexico?
arts.sum: The USMNT and Mexico are in desperate need of a reset, but will new hires Mauricio Pochettino and Javier Aguirre revitalize Concacaf's fallen giants?
